gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/200)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/200)
text: إِنْ كَانَ فِي يَدِكَ هَذِهِ شَيْ‏ءٌ فَإِنِ اسْتَطَعْتَ أَنْ لَا تَعْلَمَ هَذِهِ فَافْعَلْ
قَالَ وَ كَانَ عِنْدَهُ إِنْسَانٌ فَتَذَاكَرُوا الْإِذَاعَةَ فَقَالَ احْفَظْ لِسَانَكَ تُعَزَّ وَ لَا تُمَكِّنِ النَّاسَ مِنْ قِيَادِ رَقَبَتِكَ فَتَذِلَّ .

en.hubeali: From him, from Usman Bin Isa,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘If it was so that this matter (Al-Wilayah) was in your hands and you have the capacity that you do not teach this, then do so’.

He (the narrator) said, ‘And it was so that in his<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup> presence were some people, and they mentioned the broadcasting, so he<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup> said: ‘Preserve your tongues, you would be honoured, and do not enable the people to sit upon your necks, for you would be disgraced’.
en.sarwar: 14. It is narrated from him (narrator of the Hadith above) from ‘Uthman ibn ‘Isa from abu al-Hassan (a.s.) who has said the following: “When there is something in one of your hands, if you can, do not allow the other hand to know about it.’ The narrator has said that there was a man in his presence and they discussed publicity. The Imam said, ‘Control your tongue and you will find honor and do not allow people to become in control of your neck to humiliate you.’”
